span.p:
EngineInput
cases · shifts · locations · pickupProfiles · effortVectors

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
0 · SKILL-TIER GATE (A10)
Schichten von starter/dummy raus aus der Auto-Verteilung
(nur manuell zugeteilte Belege)

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1 · SHIFT-END CUTOFF — autoAssignableCapacityMinutes()
map shifts → cutoff-effective copies (Pkt 5, config.shiftEnd)

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2 · ENRICH — enrichCase()
classifyPriority() → rank 0–6 (Leiter B2)
computeEffort() → minutes + points (§8.2 unverändert)
teile = totalQuantity

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4 · DELIVERY GROUPS — detectDeliveryGroups() → withheldCaseIds()
same Lieferschein / consecutive WE-Beleg run (Pkt 1);
WITHHOLD: suspected (T3) + unvollständige „X von N"-Gruppen,
außer released/locked → reason = delivery_unconfirmed

span.p:
8 · DISTRIBUTE — distributeBundlesByWeightedLoad()
GENAU EIN Starter-Pack je Mitarbeiter (C3);
LPT über Minuten-Last + Specialist-/Bereich-Penalty
(schwer/leicht-Gewichtung gestrichen, C2)

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
unassigned[]
reason = pool_remaining — Self-Pull zieht
Folge-Packs (80–90 Teile) via assignNextBundle()

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
9 · PICKUP — resolvePickup() → buildPickupSequence()
per assigned pack: type→number order (§D.3), never feeds back

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

bundles · pickupSequences · unassigned · loads · diagnostics
